'''Keezo Stoolee''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] and a prisoner at [[Desolation Alley|the penal colony]] on [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] [[Kuchcel]] of an unknown [[Planet/Legends|planet]] for destroying their millennium celebration. This [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
His bounty was 3,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive, and 1,200 [[Death/Legends|dead]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
